title: Application Shell Triggers
text: Application Shell Triggers Almost all application shells share a common set of triggers that can be used to code the behavior of the application or server when it starts. The following triggers can be used in all types of application shells: trigger apStart trigger receiveMessage Application Shell Triggers Windows and character-based applications provide additional triggers for handling user interactions: trigger menu trigger keyboardSwitch trigger userKey Server Shell Triggers Server application shells, the following triggers enable you to define generic behavior before and after activating a component operation in a web environment. Typically, this would include authenticating the user of the web application. trigger preRequest trigger postRequest Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
